SELECT ts, isinf(ts) FROM timestamps WHERE ts IS NOT NULL;
WITH nested AS (SELECT ts FROM timestamps WHERE ts != TIMESTAMP 'infinity') SELECT ts, isinf(ts) FROM nested;

SELECT T1.ts, T2.isinf_value FROM (SELECT ts, isinf(ts) AS isinf_value FROM timestamps) AS T1 JOIN (SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-06-15 10:00:00' as ref_ts, isinf(TIMESTAMP '2022-06-15 10:00:00') AS ref_isinf) AS T2 ON T1.ts > T2.ref_ts;
SELECT ot, isinf(ot) FROM other_timestamps UNION SELECT ts, isinf(ts) FROM timestamps;
SELECT ts, CASE WHEN isinf(ts) THEN 'Infinite' ELSE 'Finite' END AS timestamp_status FROM timestamps WHERE ts = TIMESTAMP '-infinity';
